officials_roster.notes: Roster of current Mayor + Council. GMA page has stale data — city site is source of truth.

meeting_agendas_minutes.notes: 13+ years of archived PDFs. CivicEngage/CivicPlus platform — consistent URL pattern enables automation.

property_records.notes: Per-parcel lookup by owner name works. No bulk download or API. Bulk access requires direct request to Columbia County or scraping (against ToS).

campaign_finance.gap_explanation: Georgia municipal candidates file paper records with the City Clerk until December 31, 2026. After January 2027, filings move to the state ethics commission portal at ethics.ga.gov.
campaign_finance.user_action_path: Open records request to Grovetown City Clerk, (706) 863-4576
campaign_finance.notes: FollowTheMoney.org has zero Grovetown municipal coverage. This is a documented gap.

annual_audits.notes: Georgia Department of Audits and Accounts. State-mandated annual filing per O.C.G.A. § 36-81-7.

bond_disclosures.notes: EMMA browse blocked during automated recon. Manual verification needed. Grovetown's size suggests they may issue via county authority rather than direct.

state_open_data.notes: State-level spending and local-government financial filings. Useful supplementary source.

sunshine_law.state_statute: O.C.G.A. § 50-14-1 et seq. (Georgia Open Meetings Act)
sunshine_law.notes: Georgia Open Records Act requires response within 3 business days. Open Meetings Act requires 24-hour notice and posted agendas.

known_gaps.explanation: Local race filings held as paper records at Grovetown City Hall until Jan 2027.
known_gaps.user_facing_message: Campaign contributions for Grovetown candidates are not yet digitally available. Georgia is transitioning local filings to the state ethics portal effective January 2027.
known_gaps.remediation: Open records request to City Clerk.

known_gaps.explanation: Georgia does not require local elected officials to file personal financial disclosures.
known_gaps.user_facing_message: Georgia state law does not require Grovetown officials to disclose personal assets, investments, or income sources.
known_gaps.remediation: None — gap exists at the state law level.

known_gaps.explanation: Columbia County does not publish bulk parcel data.
known_gaps.user_facing_message: Property records are available on a per-parcel lookup basis.
known_gaps.remediation: Per-official lookup via qPublic by owner name.

known_gaps.explanation: Property held in LLCs, trusts, or out-of-state entities is not directly visible from county assessor records.
known_gaps.user_facing_message: Property holdings shown reflect parcels owned in this person's direct name. Properties held in LLCs, trusts, or out-of-state entities are not currently visible to this platform.
known_gaps.remediation: Phase 2: cross-reference with Georgia Secretary of State Corporate Registry (ecorp.sos.ga.gov) for LLCs where this official is the registered agent or organizer, plus mailing-address matching on parcel records.
